user.title: Connect to Astra Pool
user.description: Enter your ConnectMyPool Pool API Code. You can find this on the Home Automation page of the ConnectMyPool website after API access has been approved.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid Pool API Code or API key.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the ConnectMyPool service.
error.api_not_enabled: API access has not been enabled for this pool. Please request access via the ConnectMyPool website.
error.pool_not_connected: The pool system is currently not connected to ConnectMyPool.
error.rate_limited: Too many requests — please wait 60 seconds and try again.
